title: Watching from the shadows
location: QuantumFront HQ — CryoLab service corridor / equipment storage
key_actions: Carlos watches from behind, studying Sumin's reactions.
Sumin observes Carlos and Jonas closely, noting Jonas's strange behavior.
discoveries: Sumin senses Jonas's actions are suspicious and possibly connected to something being hidden.
emotional_arc: Quiet suspicion grows into focused concern.
narrative_summary: Carlos lurks nearby as Sumin studies the two technicians; she registers Jonas's odd behavior and grows increasingly uneasy that he's concealing something related to 'bridge slot' notes.

title: The ledger that shouldn't exist
location: QuantumFront HQ — CryoLab equipment storage (near record ledgers)
key_actions: Sumin flips through the QuantumFront equipment ledger and stops at suspicious entries.
discoveries: XC-4000 circulator listed at $48,000 (market $35,000); attenuator $22,000 (market $16,500); optical filter $67,000 with unclear quantity.
Aug–Oct expenditures show $1.2M billed while official DARPA account lists $400K; repeated payor: 'Benefactor — NSA Special Access Funds (SAF)'.
Red-pen margin note: '외부 보고서 포함 금지' ('do not include in external reports').
emotional_arc: Curiosity spikes into alarm as clear financial anomalies and hidden funding appear.
narrative_summary: Sumin uncovers alarming discrepancies in the equipment ledger: inflated unit prices, an $800K unexplained gap between billed and recorded DARPA funds, and a repeat notation of a 'Benefactor — NSA SAF' with a red-pen instruction to exclude external reporting.

title: Cutting off the question
location: QuantumFront HQ — CryoLab equipment storage (by the ledger)

key_dialogue.speaker: Carlos Reyes
key_dialogue.line: 이 숫자는 우리가 다루고 있는 것의 일부에 불과해. 너의 주의가 다른 곳으로 향하지 않도록 하자.

key_actions: Elena's smile drops into a warning; Carlos approaches and places his hand on the ledger, tapping the clipboard and covering the page number with his finger.
discoveries: An explicit attempt to block Sumin from probing the ledger; an unambiguous message that she lacks authority to pursue questions here.
emotional_arc: Sumin's unease shifts to being directly shut down and warned off.
narrative_summary: When Sumin voices concern about missing circulators, Elena's dismissive warning and Carlos's physical intervention—covering the page and telling Sumin to focus elsewhere—make clear she is being silenced.

title: The shutter and the blinking LED
location: QuantumFront HQ — CryoLab equipment storage (deep aisle)
key_actions: Sumin, with her phone ostensibly muted, triggers a sharp camera shutter sound; everyone turns.
A small RF detector's orange LED blinks on the shelf; Jonas smiles slightly and continues erasing.
Carlos watches Jonas's response and assesses the situation.
discoveries: Someone is detecting and responding to Sumin's attempted photo despite the phone being muted—implying active surveillance or interception.
Jonas's smile in response to the detection is a knowing signal rather than alarm.
emotional_arc: A private attempt at documentation becomes a moment of exposure and dread.
narrative_summary: Sumin's furtive photograph produces a loud shutter and a blinking RF LED; Jonas's calm, almost amused reaction shows the repository is monitored and that her actions are anticipated and seen.

title: Connecting the fragments
location: QuantumFront HQ — CryoLab and nearby break area (internal reflection)

key_dialogue.speaker: Elena Ramirez
key_dialogue.line: 아, 그건 그래. 다른 데서 빌려온 거 섞여 있어. 신경 쓸 필요 없어.

key_actions: Sumin speaks privately with Elena in the break area, and Elena shrugs off the discrepancy as unimportant.
Throughout, Carlos blocks access to the ledger and Jonas continues to alter notes while signaling with small gestures.
discoveries: The combined clues—missing circulators, ledger anomalies, 'Benefactor — NSA SAF' funding, erased 'bridge slot' notes, and references to Phase-Guard/related terminology—imply a concealed program with separate funding and controlled information flow.
Sumin recognizes that asking will mark her as an outsider; once she knows, there may be no turning back.
emotional_arc: From inquisitive to conflicted: Sumin pieces together a troubling pattern and hesitates at the cost of knowing more.
narrative_summary: Between Elena's dismissal, Carlos's physical blocking, Jonas's erasures and the ledger's hidden funding, Sumin connects terms and anomalies into a single, ominous puzzle: a secret, separately funded operation with active surveillance and erased traces. She understands the stakes but fears the irreversible consequences of digging deeper.
